name: Non-existent service account
description: A workload that explicitly references a ServiceAccount which does not exist in the same namespace will fail to start. This usually indicates a missing manifest, typo, or namespace drift.
remediation: Create the referenced ServiceAccount in the workload namespace, update serviceAccountName to an existing ServiceAccount, or remove the explicit serviceAccountName if the workload should use the default service account.
test: Check Pods, pod-template workloads, and CronJobs that explicitly set serviceAccountName and verify that a ServiceAccount with the same name exists in the same namespace.
